creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Running FreeBSD on a laptop with a GPU reported by X as a

    NVIDIA GPU Quadro K2100M (GK106GL)

After upgrading from driver version 346.96 to 367.44 the graphic exhibits massive glitching, only randomly coloured stripes are visible. The pattern changes when moving the mouse or performing any action that normally changes the display. Downgrading the package back to 346.96 fixes the problem for me, though only by chance I had the old package still lying around.
